component: Article title, authors, journal, dates, pages, and DOI
reason: Required attribution and bibliographic identity.
Defines the eight-family static experiment, statistical objective, imaging, and central non-constant-efficiency result.
Quoted prior-book language has separate copyright and is unnecessary.
Replication, geometry, calibration, dressing, failure-mode, and comparability problems motivate the study; named third-party criticisms are excluded.

component: Terminology for stand, working end, bight, and dressing
reason: Only geometry labels needed to understand the setup are paraphrased; sourced textbook definitions and tying instruction are excluded.
Codes, type, diameter, year, mission, and wear history are needed for exact specimen identity; trademarks, manufacturers, ratings, recipes, and table layout are excluded.
The G8 cord is part of one comparison; trademark, vendor, declared strength, construction, and table layout are excluded.

component: Storage, lifespan, retirement, and care claims
reason: Observational histories do not establish portable storage or retirement guidance and rely partly on vendor/third-party sources.
Slow displacement, fixture class, stable lab, calibration, and stated instrument error define the evidence; brands, build dimensions, and operating instructions are excluded.

component: Infrared apparatus and emissivity Tables III–IV
reason: Measured emissivity and high-speed observation support interpretation; brands, settings, numerical emissivity table, and apparatus recipe are excluded.
Microscopy modality supports morphology evidence; product model, settings, and images are excluded.
Within-rope variability explains replication needs; numerical strengths, aging rankings, and vendor comparisons are excluded.
Asymmetric ratio uncertainty is central; equations, formula reproduction, graph, and numerical efficiency example are excluded.

component: Standard, cross, and ring load; I and O geometry
reason: Boundary conditions are necessary to interpret results; diagrams, force recipes, and tying steps are excluded.
Preserves tested geometries, ropes, replication, and non-constant-efficiency evidence without values or operational advice.
Preserves one-rope comparison and unresolved differences without values or ranking.
Preserves one-rope geometry signal and authors' call for independent confirmation; values, ranking, and recommendation are excluded.
Preserves geometry, used-rope dispersion, cross-load comparison, and rope-strength dependency without values or recommendation.
Ring-load untying rather than rupture is salient; force thresholds and life-critical advice are excluded.
Ring-load untying and distinct endpoint are salient; values, comparison ranking, and life-critical advice are excluded.
Preserves limited geometry and comparison populations without numerical values or ranking.
Preserves cross-load-only, one-rope/one-cord evidence; ranking and field recommendation are excluded.

component: Ranking Table V and comparison Figure 22
reason: Portable numerical ranking and efficiencies would invite invalid transfer.
Localized heating near rupture is supported, but causal order and any threshold use remain unresolved.
Fiber-end morphology is observed; heat/deformation/cooling explanation remains a hypothesis.
Preserves low-stretch, slow-static, loop-only, variable-control, and generalization boundaries.
No tying diagrams, photographs, probability plots, thermal frames, microscopy, apparatus visuals, or close caption substitutes are retained.
Selected neutral specimen facts are manually restated, but table layouts, vendor claims, standards values, efficiencies, and rankings are excluded.

component: Standards text, references, and prior-work claims
reason: Third-party works and standards have separate rights and were not audited as scientific sources.
Commercial support and marks are recorded only as a rights caution and carry no endorsement or training value.

component: Publisher CC BY 4.0 statement and license deed
reason: Supports adaptation with attribution, link, and change notice; source web bodies are not retained.
No validation for natural fiber, bondage, body contact, dynamic/cyclic loading, uplines, human suspension, ratings, retirement, or safe-knot selection.
